GeneralDescription.SourceString: No sword nor crown will keep her from her destiny.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: No sword nor crown will keep her from her destiny.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Sick of waiting for a grand destiny to find her, Princess Lexa of the ageless kingdom has decided to track it down herself. Leaving behind the stuffy life of royalty, she's ready for a true adventure.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Sick of waiting for a grand destiny to find her, Princess Lexa of the ageless kingdom has decided to track it down herself. Leaving behind the stuffy life of royalty, she's ready for a true adventure.
